title: Change Record
description: A structured record of a significant change to platform-compliance. Required for any PR that modifies normative content (controls, profiles, bindings, schemas, policies, gate criteria). Referenced in PR descriptions as 'Change Record: CHG-YYYYMMDD-NNN'.

affected_object_ids.description: IDs of all objects modified by this change (e.g., control IDs, profile IDs, schema filenames).

related_adr_id.description: ADR that drove or documents this change.

breaking.description: Whether this change breaks existing consuming repositories. If true, migration_guidance is required.

migration_guidance.description: Required when breaking is true. Instructions for what downstream repositories must do to adapt.

review_refs.description: Pull request URL(s) or review record references.
